title: Log on to a Path
text: Log on to a Path To log on to a path using the Log On form: Enter your user name in the User Name field. Some operating systems group user names into domains, user groups and so on. If required, enter the additional information in the User Name field, using the following format: UserName + AdditionalData UserName is your user name AdditionalData is the additional information required by the operating system. Enter your password in the Password field and click OK . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
